name: Discord
description: Discord connector for elizaOS servers, voice, and message management with Eliza Cloud OAuth gateway or local bot-token setup.

DISCORD_API_TOKEN.label: Api Token
DISCORD_API_TOKEN.help: Discord API token used to authenticate and log in the Discord client/service.

DISCORD_APPLICATION_ID.label: Application Id
DISCORD_APPLICATION_ID.help: Discord application ID for the bot (auto-resolved from bot token if omitted)

CHANNEL_IDS.label: Ids
CHANNEL_IDS.help: Comma-separated list of Discord channel IDs that will be parsed into an array if provided.

DISCORD_TEST_CHANNEL_ID.label: Test Channel Id
DISCORD_TEST_CHANNEL_ID.help: Discord channel ID used during test suite to locate the test channel for sending messages, voice interactions, and other test operations.

DISCORD_VOICE_CHANNEL_ID.label: Voice Channel Id
DISCORD_VOICE_CHANNEL_ID.help: ID of the Discord voice channel the bot should join when scanning a guild. If not supplied, the bot selects a channel based on member activity.

DISCORD_SHOULD_IGNORE_BOT_MESSAGES.label: Should Ignore Bot Messages
DISCORD_SHOULD_IGNORE_BOT_MESSAGES.help: If true, the bot will ignore messages from other bots. Can be overridden by character settings.

DISCORD_SHOULD_IGNORE_DIRECT_MESSAGES.label: Should Ignore Direct Messages
DISCORD_SHOULD_IGNORE_DIRECT_MESSAGES.help: If true, the bot will ignore direct messages. Can be overridden by character settings.

DISCORD_SHOULD_RESPOND_ONLY_TO_MENTIONS.label: Should Respond Only To Mentions
DISCORD_SHOULD_RESPOND_ONLY_TO_MENTIONS.help: If true, the bot will only respond when explicitly mentioned. Can be overridden by character settings.

DISCORD_LISTEN_CHANNEL_IDS.label: Listen Channel Ids
DISCORD_LISTEN_CHANNEL_IDS.help: Comma-separated list of Discord channel IDs where the bot will only listen (not respond).
